description: VR Dura Lift is machine room traction type elevator driven by with a 3Phase AC motor, electro mechanical brake, heat treated alloy steel worm shaft, centrifugally cast bronze worm gear wheel and superior grade cast iron drive sheave all compactly mounted on a single base. The geared machine, along with the related control panels is installed in a separate room located on the top of lift shaft.
longDescription: These elevators are ideal for applications that require a combination of rapid speed, high travel and heavy lifting capacity, such as high-rise residential buildings, office towers, hospitals, universities and colleges. The car shape makes it ideal for use in any building where the elevator performs a dual role for passengers and service.

cabinDesign: MS Powder Coated Finish
SS Mirror / Matt / Hair Line Finish
SS Titanium Gold / Etching
SS with Mirror / Toughened Glass / MS Laminates

advantages: Highly tried and tested system. Rugged in construction and long life.
Availability of higher speeds and support higher buildings than other lift system.
Separate machine room for motor and control systems ensures higher safety factor and long life of components.
Highest value for money than any elevator of same rating of different mechanism.
Can facilitate front and reverse openings in any configuration.
Minimal and easy maintenance as compared to other traction lifts.
Save up to 50% energy with a microprocessor based control panel offering variable voltage and variable frequency modules.

description: VL Ultima machine roomless elevator adopts the most advanced permanent magnet synchronous and gearless traction technology in the world. The gearless machine, along with the related drive equipment is all installed inside the hoist way eliminating the need for a machine room saving you valuable floor space.
longDescription: It delivers exceptional performance with the use of all micro-computer intellectual control system and elevator special-purpose VVVF frequency converter. As a result, this series elevators are equipped with the outstanding features of green environment protection, highly effective energy and space saving. These Elevators are widely applicable for the hotels, medium to high rise residential and commercial buildings.

cabinDesign: MS Powder Coated Finish
SS Mirror / Matt / Hair Line Finish
SS Titanium Gold / Etching
SS with Mirror / Toughened Glass / MS Laminates

advantages: Requires no machine room, hence space saving and faster installation.
Low headroom height is required which provides addition opening at the top floor which was inaccessible by Machine Room Lift.
Accommodates front and rear openings in any configuration.
Minimum maintenance as compared to other traction lifts.
Allows significantly higher car speeds than hydraulic designs.
Features a robust design with smart controller features.
Vast range of aesthetic options to choose from Green riding platform saves energy and expenses.

description: Our Hydraulic range of elevators offer maximum style and ride comfort with minimum installation effort. VH Elance Lift system is powered by hydraulic piston that travels when oil is pumped which smoothly lifts the elevator cab. Electrical valves control the release of the oil for a gentle descent.
longDescription: VH Elance Lift is offered exclusively in technical collaboration with GMV Italy. This hydraulic elevator does not require a fixed room to house the hydraulic machinery, instead, the machinery itself is installed on the ground floor and the controller is installed behind a locked cabinet on the wall near the elevator. These elevators are widely applicable for the home, hotels, offices and other commercial buildings up to 5 floors.

cabinDesign: MS Powder Coated Finish
SS Mirror / Matt / Hair Line Finish
SS Titanium Gold / Etching
SS with Mirror / Toughened Glass / MS Laminates

advantages: The elevator is of GMV make and entirely imported from Italy.
A great deal of design freedom for architects as very less space is required.
No constraints on doorways or the shape of the cabin.
Simple, economical and super-fast installation.
Low-maintenance drive technology.
No wear on pulleys and ropes.
No jack hole is required, without a jack in the ground; the risk of oil contamination is eliminated.
No extensive pit or overhead is required.

description: VG Power Lifts are meant especially for industrial Purpose. These types of elevators are usually designed with rugged interiors and are intended to carry both passengers as well as freight. We have design goods lifts for weight up to 5000 Kgs. The size, capacity and interior of the lifts can be as per specific requirements.
longDescription: Doors to be provided for goods lifts may be ordinary Collapsible Gates, Imperforate Doors, Vertical Bi Parting Gates and Sliding Gates. VG Power Lifts are used among an uncountable number of reputed customers owing to their high performance and cost effectiveness. They are made of sturdy and rugged provided no willful damage is done to it.

cabinDesign: MS Powder Coated Finish
Metal Sheet / Checkered Plate / Wooden flooring
specifications.doorType: Manual Collapsible, Imperforate Gates, Vertical Parting, Auto Center Opening or Telescopic Opening

advantages: Highly customizable to match industry specific requirements.
Heavy duty and high-quality components for enduring the challenges of industrial usage.
Very low maintenance and zero breakdown.
Sturdy and ageless construction.
Can be designed with rugged interiors and intended to carry both passengers as well as freight.
Multiple openings like Reverse Openings and openings at 90 degrees to each other are possible.

description: VL Villa Lifts are driven by Single Phase AC motor. These lifts are specially designed to be compact in size and even lesser in energy demands. Coupled with manual doors, these lifts can be installed indoors or outdoors to be a masterpiece. Impress your guests with this multi-feature marvel designed with the kind of options that you and your architect would love to explore.
longDescription: Perfect for residential villas, penthouses, and multi-story homes. The compact design ensures minimal space requirements while maintaining elegant aesthetics and smooth operation.

Minimal and easy maintenance as compared to other traction lifts.

description: The Vertical transportation system for modern hospitals have special requirements such as spacious & durable car, smooth & comfortable travel, accurate stop with emergency control features and above all, reliability with safety. VS Pulse Lift dimensions are as per the Indian Standard requirements for Hospital lifts. Main features of these lifts are used for hospital purpose, modified as per client specifications, the best possible performance, and smooth operation.
longDescription: Designed specifically for healthcare facilities including hospitals, clinics, nursing homes, and medical centers. Accommodates stretchers, wheelchairs, medical equipment trolleys, and multiple attendants with ease.

Stainless Steel Titanium Gold / Etching

advantages: Noise free operation as required in medical facilities.
Specially designed for intensive usage and essential reliability.
Smooth & jerk less start and stop.
Doors are heavy duty to withstand impacts and high usage cycles.
The lift cabs are robustly constructed to withstand impacts from beds, wheel chair, heated food trolleys etc.
Economical and Low power consumption.
Robust Build for long life and superior performance.
Extra Safety Features.

description: VC Pure View Lifts give an additional eye catching look to a modern building and act as architectural highlights of the buildings. They act like the ornaments of a building for they enhance the beauty and bring life in it. We provide capsule elevators for Hotels, Apartments, shopping malls etc. We provide all types of capsule lifts having ultramodern design to provide a cosmic zone experience to the passengers.
longDescription: Transform your building with a stunning panoramic elevator that serves as both functional transportation and an architectural statement. Perfect for hotels, shopping malls, commercial complexes, and luxury apartments.

cabinDesign: SS Mirror / Matt / Gold Frames fitted with Toughened Glass / Printed Glass / Laminates

advantages: VC Pure View Elevators act as Architectural highlights on prestigious buildings.
Reliable and economical operation with minimum maintenance.
Noise free operation as required in Shopping Mall, Office, Multiplex etc.
Specially designed for intensive usage and essential reliability.
The VVVF close loop microprocessor controller incorporated with the system makes the whole operation very sophisticated.
Available in various design from different sizes, shapes and built material.

description: VD Minion Range covers a host of application and is capable of transporting items as diverse as packages, plates and crates. Compact in design, the dumbwaiter is also extremely robust and as such is noted for its reliability. Two doors are available swing and bi-parting and there are shelf loading and floor loading options. All models supplied within the range are supplied with a self-supporting, steel modular pylon on which equipment is pre mounted.
longDescription: Ideal for restaurants, hotels, hospitals, libraries, offices, and residential buildings. Efficiently transports food, documents, laundry, medical supplies, and other goods between floors without taking up valuable passenger elevator space.

Stainless Steel Titanium Gold / Etching
SS with Mirror / Printed Glass / MS Laminates

advantages: Practical and simple to use in every environment.
